parameters.query:
INSERT INTO signal_overrides (
  signal_id,
  override_action,
  override_by,
  override_reason,
  previous_level,
  new_impact_level,
  previous_score,
  new_score,
  slack_channel,
  slack_user_id,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.signalId }}',
  '{{ $json.action }}',
  '{{ $json.overrideBy }}',
  '{{ $json.reason }}',
  '{{ $json.previousLevel }}',
  '{{ $json.finalLevel }}',
  {{ $json.previousScore }},
  {{ $json.newScore }},
  '{{ $json.slackChannel }}',
  '{{ $json.slackUserId }}',
  NOW()
);

UPDATE signals SET
  override_status = 'approved',
  override_by     = '{{ $json.overrideBy }}',
  override_reason = '{{ ($json.reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  override_at     = NOW()
WHERE source_id = '{{ $json.signalId }}';

UPDATE signals SET
  impact_level    = 'HIGH',
  impact_score    = GREATEST(impact_score, 8.5),
  is_urgent       = true,
  override_status = 'escalated',
  override_by     = '{{ $json.overrideBy }}',
  override_reason = '{{ ($json.reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  override_at     = NOW()
WHERE source_id = '{{ $json.signalId }}';

UPDATE signals SET
  override_status = 'dismissed',
  override_by     = '{{ $json.overrideBy }}',
  override_reason = '{{ ($json.reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  override_at     = NOW(),
  is_urgent       = false
WHERE source_id = '{{ $json.signalId }}';

UPDATE signals SET
  impact_level    = '{{ $json.newLevel }}',
  impact_score    = {{ $json.newScore }},
  override_status = 'reclassified',
  override_by     = '{{ $json.overrideBy }}',
  override_reason = '{{ ($json.reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  override_at     = NOW()
WHERE source_id = '{{ $json.signalId }}';

parameters.text: ={{ $json.actionEmoji }} OncoWatch Human Override  • Signal ID: {{ $json.signalId }} • Action: {{ $json.actionLabel }} ({{ $json.action }}) • Drug: {{ $json.drug }} • Indication: {{ $json.indication }} • Previous level: {{ $json.previousLevel }} • New level: {{ $json.finalLevel }} • Previous score: {{ $json.previousScore }} • New score: {{ $json.newScore }} ({{ $json.scoreDeltaStr }}) • Competitor: {{ $json.isCompetitor ? 'Yes' : 'No' }} • Reason: {{ $json.reason }} • Override by: {{ $json.overrideBy }} • Urgent after override: {{ $json.isUrgentAfterOverride ? 'YES' : 'NO' }} • Logged at: {{ $json.processedAt }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  source_id,
  key_drug,
  key_indication,
  sponsor,
  impact_level,
  impact_score,
  signal_type,
  competitor_flag,
  ai_summary,
  override_status,
  url
FROM signals
WHERE source_id = '{{ $json.signalId }}'
LIMIT 1;
